testcase.name: test_reports_query_jobs
testcase.failure: tests/test_checklists_reports_stripe.py:35: in test_reports_query_jobs assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: {"detail":"Internal server error","status_code":500} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
